reviews.comment:
el sabado 8 de enero del corriente fui a cargar nafta con tarjeta de credito me cobraron el importe y ahora cuando me fijo en movimientos del periodo me cobraron 500 pesos mas no se de que, encima llamo al numero de telefono y no atienden. ya mismo voy a ocuparme de que quien hizo eso pague por chorro

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday, January 8th, I went to fill up with a credit card. They charged me the amount, and now when I check the transactions for the period, they charged me 500 pesos more. I don't know why. On top of that, I called the phone number, and they didn't answer. I'm going to make sure whoever did that pays right away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbTVDVURREAE

reviews.comment:
La nafta infinia es de mala calidad no tiene el octanaje que promocionan y tiene muy poco rendimiento comparada con la nafta uruguaya tiene el 30% menos de rendimiento

(Translated by Google)
Infinia gasoline is of poor quality; it does not have the octane rating they advertise and has very poor performance compared to Uruguayan gasoline, offering 30% less performance.
